72852970-6825-4462-b8fe-bca6a9fe2ff3.text: Look up Excel formulas to process data in Excel when the required formula is unknown.

source_statements: Ask AI tools for Excel formulas to efficiently process data in Excel when the required formula is unknown.
metadata.notes: This is a distinct task focused on obtaining Excel formulas with AI assistance for data processing.

statement_parts.outcome: to identify formulas needed to process data in Excel

8cc86f3e-4c4d-4e85-a293-4bd9c06b6f07.text: Provide business process context to AI tools to obtain support tailored to the subsidiary's business process.

source_statements: Clarify the business context to AI tools before using them, to ensure the AI provides relevant support for the specific subsidiary's business process.
metadata.notes: This statement describes a separate prompting task that prepares AI interactions by supplying business context.

statement_parts.outcome: to obtain support tailored to the subsidiary's business process

8075a995-69b0-4b82-920a-770852da8321.text: Verify AI-generated answers by cross-checking, researching, and questioning the AI's reasoning, including providing screenshots when needed, to confirm the accuracy and logical validity of the output.

source_statements: Critically review AI-generated answers, especially for logic or coding tasks, by questioning the AI's reasoning and providing screenshots when answers appear incorrect.
Verify AI-generated answers by cross-checking and researching as needed, recognizing that the time spent is similar to traditional research methods.
metadata.notes: Both statements describe validating AI outputs. They were merged because they share the same core activity of checking AI-generated answers, while one adds methods such as questioning reasoning and supplying screenshots and the other adds cross-checking and research.

statement_parts.outcome: to confirm the accuracy and logical validity of the output

ea9abfda-f669-44ee-a1c4-08d89ea59377.text: Discuss work results and work processes with the team or management to obtain collaborative review and alignment.

source_statements: Discuss the results and processes of work collaboratively with the team or management, regardless of whether AI tools were used.
metadata.notes: This is a distinct communication task involving review of work outputs and processes with colleagues or management.

statement_parts.outcome: to obtain collaborative review and alignment

e3857a5c-1837-42f1-8787-acdcbb9fcf1a.text: Review research literature to identify relevant prior work and techniques.

source_statements: Read current state-of-the-art research papers in AI and climate science to identify new techniques and ideas for improving climate prediction.
Sift through large volumes of new literature in the vision-language model (VLM) space to identify relevant papers for research.
Conduct independent research, including implementation, literature review, and brainstorming new ideas, using AI tools to increase productivity.
Use AI tools to conduct deep research before meetings with advisors to discuss prior works and assess feasibility of proposed research topics.
metadata.notes: Merged literature-scanning and prior-work review tasks across AI/climate and VLM contexts. AI tools were explicitly mentioned by one participant and can generalize to the broader review activity.

statement_parts.outcome: to identify relevant prior work and techniques

de58f9fa-ce06-431e-be79-330c32a67f3e.text: Compare and select AI methods for identified research problems to choose approaches for experimentation.

source_statements: Survey, compare, and select AI techniques for adaptation and application to identified climate science problems.
metadata.notes: Distinct from literature review because it focuses on evaluating candidate methods for a specific problem and deciding what to test.

statement_parts.object: AI methods for identified research problems
statement_parts.outcome: to choose approaches for experimentation

7db5bb67-6e25-4b35-8fe1-ef575989a054.text: Consult domain experts to identify research problems that can be addressed with AI methods.

source_statements: Collaborate and communicate with climate science experts to identify key problems and challenges in the field that can be addressed using AI techniques.
metadata.notes: Kept separate because it centers on eliciting problem definitions from experts rather than reviewing literature or selecting methods.

statement_parts.outcome: to identify research problems that can be addressed with AI methods

fe8d0bf7-25e7-43d4-af8a-0a9b0badadb8.text: Design experiments and prototype model architectures to test research hypotheses and evaluate AI methods.

source_statements: Conduct experiments with selected AI methods, including coding and debugging, to apply them to climate science problems and evaluate their effectiveness.
Design experiments and explore new NLP architectures to ensure technical rigor in model evaluation frameworks.
Brainstorm and prototype new architectures for multimodal alignment or novel evaluation metrics to validate research hypotheses.
metadata.notes: Merged experiment design, execution, and architecture prototyping because all describe setting up and running research tests. Preserved both hypothesis-testing and evaluation aspects.

statement_parts.outcome: to test research hypotheses and evaluate AI methods

07fe2bd6-ec01-47c3-9590-bad064cd50f6.text: Write code for model training, inference, and research prototypes to produce runnable experimental systems.

source_statements: Conduct experiments with selected AI methods, including coding and debugging, to apply them to climate science problems and evaluate their effectiveness.
Develop and run code for experiments, model inference, and training scripts to translate theoretical NLP concepts into tangible results.
Offload repetitive boilerplate coding, data preparation, and verification tasks to AI tools to reduce tedium and focus on research.
Perform coding tasks to solve problems in the context of AI research and product development.
metadata.notes: Merged coding tasks tied to AI research and experimentation. Included AI-assisted boilerplate coding as a variant of the same core activity.

statement_parts.object: code for model training, inference, and research prototypes
statement_parts.outcome: to produce runnable experimental systems

d2153a9c-3057-4f11-9566-52400e6913fa.text: Debug research code and distributed systems to resolve failures in experimental and production workflows.

source_statements: Conduct experiments with selected AI methods, including coding and debugging, to apply them to climate science problems and evaluate their effectiveness.
Debug issues in large-scale distributed systems to ensure reliability and efficiency.
metadata.notes: Merged debugging activities because both involve diagnosing and fixing technical issues, while preserving that one occurs in research code and the other in distributed systems.

statement_parts.outcome: to resolve failures in experimental and production workflows

75804cff-e2fc-4c76-a5e0-44750031a99f.text: Analyze model outputs and platform data to identify patterns, biases, and decision-relevant findings.

source_statements: Analyze model outputs to identify patterns or biases that inform evaluation frameworks.
Perform data analysis on the peer review platform to support decision-making and improve platform outcomes.
Use AI tools to explore data, prototype solutions, and understand complex system behavior to work more efficiently and focus on higher-level problem solving.
metadata.notes: Merged analysis of model outputs, operational platform data, and AI-assisted data exploration because all involve examining data to extract actionable findings.

statement_parts.outcome: to identify patterns, biases, and decision-relevant findings

ff5fb2e1-002c-4b09-9651-b12d9ec976c1.text: Annotate datasets to create ground-truth labels for model evaluation.

statement_parts.outcome: to deliver scalable and reliable system functionality

3f5b7d14-a0dc-476e-88bf-8188717a3baf.text: Record training videos from finalized scripts to produce educational content for clients and employees.

source_statements: Record training videos based on finalized scripts to create educational content for clients and employees.
metadata.notes: Kept separate because recording videos is a production task with different methods and outputs from script writing or general content design.

statement_parts.outcome: to produce educational content for clients and employees

0cf42966-4902-437a-8fa3-9ccee046d1e8.text: Plan webinar sessions to generate titles, topics, and key points for employee learning events.

source_statements: Conduct quarterly webinar sharing sessions using AI to generate topics and key points for the sessions.
Generate and select suitable webinar titles using AI, iteratively prompting and combining AI outputs to create engaging titles.
metadata.notes: Merged statements focused on AI-assisted webinar planning. The title-generation task overlaps with generating topics and key points and was combined as part of preparing webinar content. The delivery aspect of 'conduct quarterly webinar sharing sessions' was not retained because the statement's concrete task detail centered on AI-generated planning inputs.

statement_parts.outcome: to generate titles, topics, and key points for employee learning events

6404e418-1272-4409-abdd-f8859f692179.text: Gather information from software demo sessions to draft training scripts and materials.

source_statements: Attend software demo sessions to gather information needed for creating training scripts and materials.
metadata.notes: Kept separate because collecting source information from demo sessions is a distinct input-gathering activity that can precede content development.

statement_parts.outcome: to draft training scripts and materials

b5d29677-e2e8-4d3c-b28a-57ba548bb043.text: Schedule needs analysis, content creation, and collaboration activities to organize training development work.

source_statements: Prioritize and schedule tasks such as needs analysis, content creation, and collaboration based on priorities and due dates.
metadata.notes: This task is distinct because it concerns planning and sequencing work activities rather than analyzing needs, creating content, or delivering training.

statement_parts.object: needs analysis, content creation, and collaboration activities
statement_parts.outcome: to organize training development work

f0e891c4-5bd6-49db-9184-b0a64ef4d5a0.text: Track inventory stock and SKUs in Google Sheets to maintain accurate inventory records.
f0e891c4-5bd6-49db-9184-b0a64ef4d5a0.source: Wholesale and Retail Buyers, Except Farm Products

source_statements: Manually track and update inventory stock and SKUs for the trading card shop using Google Sheets formulas to maintain accurate records.
metadata.notes: Distinct inventory control task involving stock records, SKU maintenance, and a named tool.

statement_parts.object: inventory stock and SKUs in Google Sheets
statement_parts.outcome: to maintain accurate inventory records

46f1f3a6-4020-41de-b9f4-baf0b2d2c775.text: Set merchandise prices based on real-time team updates to guide buying and selling decisions.
46f1f3a6-4020-41de-b9f4-baf0b2d2c775.source: Wholesale and Retail Buyers, Except Farm Products

source_statements: Set prices for trading card collections or singles based on real-time updates from team members to facilitate buying and selling decisions.
metadata.notes: Distinct pricing task focused on determining merchandise prices from current internal information.

statement_parts.outcome: to guide buying and selling decisions

a5725263-6665-48d1-8534-021c3066b4aa.text: Coordinate foreign currency transactions with established agents to fulfill customer requests for balances such as USD or Alipay.
a5725263-6665-48d1-8534-021c3066b4aa.source: Wholesale and Retail Buyers, Except Farm Products

source_statements: Facilitate foreign currency transactions for customers by coordinating with established agents to fulfill requests such as USD or Alipay balances.
metadata.notes: Distinct transaction coordination task involving external agents and customer currency requests.

statement_parts.object: foreign currency transactions with established agents
statement_parts.outcome: to fulfill customer requests for balances such as USD or Alipay

343c482f-84d9-4cdc-bdf3-72242cccd2b9.text: Buy and sell digital game currency based on current market conditions to complete timely and profitable transactions.
343c482f-84d9-4cdc-bdf3-72242cccd2b9.source: Wholesale and Retail Buyers, Except Farm Products

source_statements: Buy and sell digital game currency with close attention to current market conditions to ensure timely and profitable transactions.
metadata.notes: Distinct trading task focused on digital game currency rather than physical merchandise or foreign exchange fulfillment.

statement_parts.outcome: to complete timely and profitable transactions

9c200cdd-f5f6-44c4-a323-5c13e7c32432.text: Assign business function roles to team members to cover additional operations.
9c200cdd-f5f6-44c4-a323-5c13e7c32432.source: Wholesale and Retail Buyers, Except Farm Products

source_statements: Assign roles and expand the team to cover additional business functions as the businesses grow, ensuring effective management.
metadata.notes: Distinct staffing and work allocation task; not redundant with pricing, inventory, or transaction activities.

statement_parts.object: business function roles to team members
statement_parts.outcome: to cover additional operations

f48dd7e2-7c06-4c62-927d-434cecab8766.text: Capture gameplay footage from video games to provide source material for videos and guides.

source_statements: Play games such as Arknights, Genshin Impact, and Honkai Star Rail to capture gameplay footage for use in content creation and guides.
metadata.notes: This statement describes the distinct production task of recording raw gameplay footage. It is related to editing and guide writing but requires different methods and produces a different immediate output.

statement_parts.outcome: to provide source material for videos and guides

97c68884-1f58-4e71-ba76-65eb22dce40d.text: Edit gameplay clips into videos and guide content to produce engaging material for viewers.

source_statements: Edit captured gameplay clips into videos or guides to produce engaging content for viewers.
metadata.notes: This statement stands alone as a post-production task focused on transforming captured footage into publishable content.

statement_parts.object: gameplay clips into videos and guide content
statement_parts.outcome: to produce engaging material for viewers

4057d60b-c6fc-4cdd-b405-e55b827cddd2.text: Write game update guides and informational content to inform and assist viewers.

source_statements: Create guides and informational content based on new game updates to inform and assist viewers.
metadata.notes: This is a distinct writing task centered on producing explanatory content about game updates, separate from footage capture, editing, and idea generation.

statement_parts.object: game update guides and informational content
statement_parts.outcome: to inform and assist viewers

34409ef8-f001-45e0-b496-9ba28189a5b3.text: Monitor community trends and memes to generate content ideas for relevant and engaging posts and videos.

source_statements: Generate content ideas by monitoring popular community trends and memes to increase engagement and relevance.
metadata.notes: This statement describes editorial planning and ideation based on audience culture and trends, which is distinct from content production tasks.

statement_parts.outcome: to generate content ideas for relevant and engaging posts and videos

criteria: Same core action and object domain (e.g. both involve reviewing code with teammates) OR
One is a specific instance of the other (attending standups IS sharing progress updates with the team) OR
One is a subtask of the other
A job analyst would describe them with the same canonical task statement
Tasks represent the same type of work even if phrased differently by different people
